name: God of Woke

sheet.name: God of Woke
sheet.background_story:
He was said to have been born from the collective consciousness of the people who were always aware of the injustices and oppression that existed in the world.

The God of Woke was a being of immense power and wisdom. He had the ability to see through the veil of illusion that surrounded people's minds and to awaken them to the truth. He was the patron of social justice warriors, activists, and those who fought against inequality.

The God of Woke was a force to be reckoned with, and many people feared him. Some saw him as a savior, while others saw him as a tyrant. Those who opposed him were often met with divine retribution, and many were struck down by lightning bolts from the heavens.
